Writing

I find writing to be another way to express creative ideas. I am not a natural writer, but the process of pen to paper is a process that helps to unlock other elements of my design brain.

The Immorality of AI Anthropomorphism

It is ethically wrong to design and use AI as if it were a person. A reflection on psychological harm, manipulation, and the category mistake of treating tools as companions.

Slice and Dice: Filters in Data Intensive Enterprise Applications

How progressive disclosure and global filtering can tame complexity in enterprise dashboards. A case study from Syncrofy's transfer list redesign.

Jan 15, 2026

Problems > Solutions

Finding a problem is significantly harder than finding a solution. Why mature teams measure progress by outcome, not output.

Breaking into UX: Building a portfolio with AI

How to use AI tools strategically to build a compelling portfolio—from feasibility loops to edge case generation to measurable results.
